# Peblla Brand Guidelines

## Company Overview

**Peblla** is a Restaurant POS + Online Ordering platform, targeting Asian independent restaurants — sushi, conveyor belt sushi, ramen, boba tea, and more.

### Core Systems

| System | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Peblla Enterprise** | Multi-location corporate management |
| **OMS** | Operations Management System |
| **CIF** | Customer Information Form |

## Logo

### Design

- **Style**: Lowercase wordmark `peblla` with an abstract "P" icon on the left side
- **Versions**:
  - **Black** (default)
  - **Orange** (#FF4D00)
  - **White**

### Assets

| Source | Location |
|--------|----------|
| Brand Guide (Figma) | https://www.figma.com/design/LC4IlAdJfxIhiuHE7g4PTD/Peblla-Brand-Guidelines |
| Vector Files (Feishu) | https://riverroad.feishu.cn/drive/folder/NPW5fo7DRlOn2DdpOPFcVUsNnxf |
| Local Asset Library | `shared/peblla-logo/01 Peblla Logo/` |

### Local Asset Inventory

- **Symbol Mark** (icon): PNG x6
- **WordMark**: PNG x5
- **AI Vector Source**: x4

> When producing marketing materials, always pull from the local asset library first — no need to extract from the website.

## Brand Colors

| Name | Hex | Usage |
|------|-----|-------|
| **Primary Black** | `#1A1A1A` | CTA buttons, active states |
| **Brand Orange** | `#FF4D00` | Accent, minimal usage |
| **Info Gray** | `#666666` | Badges, data, icons |
| **Background** | `#FFFFFF` | Default surface |

See [UI Design System](./ui-design-system.md) for the full color token reference.

## Official Contact

| Purpose | Email |
|---------|-------|

| Marketing | marketing@peblla.com |

## Brand Voice

- Professional but approachable
- Focused on restaurant efficiency and technology
- Target audience: Asian independent restaurant owners and operators in North America
